title: Signs of improving demand boosts sentiment
section_path: Signs of improving demand boosts sentiment
section_path_text: Signs of improving demand boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
Metal markets gained amid signs of improving demand. Easing supply disruptions saw energy markets remain under pressure. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: $1.png | assets/2024-09-16_signs-of-improving-demand-boosts-sentiment_img_241_3c8ad036bdf6.png
Prices and commentary accurate as of 07:00 Sydney/05:00 Singapore/17:00(-1d) New York/22:00(-1d) London.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Metal markets gained amid signs of improving demand. Easing supply disruptions saw energy markets remain under pressure.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Gold climbed to a record high last week as investors increased their odds of an aggressive rate cut by the Fed. Swaps markets are now pricing in a 40% chance of a 50bp cut by the Fed at this week's FOMC meeting.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Further weakness in China's economy could see Beijing introduce more stimulus measures. Image reference: $2.png | assets/2024-09-16_signs-of-improving-demand-boosts-sentiment_img_242_1b830cd0cd20.png
Data source: Commodities Wrap
